creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for the feedback.

This issue was solved by making serviio compatible with javavmwrapper in commit fabbea96d4da87e7bf26fb7c6b0e9c41d7007173.
And nobody chimed in with a "me too" about other ports, so let's close this PR.

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/net/serviio/files/serviiod.in?id=fabbea96d4da87e7bf26fb7c6b0e9c41d7007173
